ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the publication is published */,
  "volume_no" INTEGER /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "page_no" TEXT /* Page number(s) of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "affiliated_to_cens" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is affiliated with CeNS */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the publication is published */,
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication type */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the publication */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded file of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publication_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the researcher is currently affiliated with CeNS */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined CeNS */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the researcher left CeNS (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authorships" (
  "authorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authorship */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "order_of_authorship" INTEGER /* Order of authorship (e.g., first author, second author) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the researcher to the publication (e.g., data collection, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorships_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authorships_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
column_names: ID of the journal where the publication is published
Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication
Indicates if the publication is affiliated with CeNS
Number of citations the publication has received
Impact factor of the journal where the publication is published
Path to the uploaded file of the publication
Indicates if the researcher is currently affiliated with CeNS
Date the researcher left CeNS (if applicable)
Order of authorship (e.g., first author, second author)
Contribution of the researcher to the publication (e.g., data collection, analysis)
International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal
Unique identifier for each publication type
